data.name: ProfilesError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during profile operation.

data.name: ProfilesError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Profiles.

data.value: A database error occurred during material operation.

data.name: MaterialsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Materials.

data.name: DeliveryError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during delivery operation.

data.name: RequisitionError.ProjectReferenceNotFound
data.value: The project referenced by the requisition was not found.

data.name: ProcurementError.SupplierReferenceNotSelectable
data.value: The supplier referenced by the purchase order was not found or is inactive.

data.name: DeliveryError.PurchaseOrderReferenceNotFound
data.value: The purchase order referenced by the delivery was not found.
